observation.command: for dir in /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0 /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-1 /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-2 /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-3; do for f in "$dir"/*.sysu.c; do /workspace/YatCC/llvm/install/bin/clang -cc1 -dump-tokens "$f" 2>&1 | grep -oP "^[\w_]+"; done; done | sort -u
